bunfig.toml.note: timeout is set via --timeout CLI flag, not bunfig.toml (bun issue #7789)

preload_behavior.env_isolation: sets XDG_* env vars to temp dirs scoped by PID
preload_behavior.home_isolation: sets OPENCODE_TEST_HOME to prevent pickup of ~/.claude/skills
preload_behavior.auth_isolation: deletes 20+ provider API key env vars (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.)
preload_behavior.teardown: afterAll handler closes Database, force-GCs, retries rm up to 30x with 100ms backoff (handles EBUSY on Windows SQLite WAL)
preload_behavior.log_init: initializes Log (print=false, dev=true, level=DEBUG) and initProjectors()

primary_pattern.name: Effect-based layer injection
primary_pattern.description: Most tests for core services use Effect layers. A custom `testEffect()` / `it` wrapper merges test layers (TestClock, TestConsole) with service layers.
primary_pattern.bun_test_wrapper: test/lib/effect.ts exports `it = { effect, live, instance }` — a wrapper around bun:test that builds Effect layers via `Layer.buildWithMemoMap` and runs scoped effects.
primary_pattern.standard_imports: `import { describe, expect } from "bun:test"`, `import { Effect, Exit, Layer } from "effect"`, `import { testEffect, it } from "../lib/effect"`, `import { tmpdirScoped, TestInstance } from "../fixture/fixture"`
primary_pattern.lifecycle: Effect.scoped manages resource lifecycle; no beforeEach/afterEach needed for DB/filesystem — scoped layers handle teardown

secondary_pattern.name: Pure bun:test (TUI/CLI unit tests)
secondary_pattern.description: CLI/TUI tests (under test/cli/) use plain bun:test `describe`/`test` blocks without Effect layers. These test pure functions: formatters, parsers, prompt logic, diff viewer.

test_structure.describe_usage: Used for grouping test suites; test() is the standard block.
test_structure.mocking: No manual mock()/mock.module() observed. Effect's Layer system provides dependency injection — tests inject fake/stub layers instead of mocking modules.
test_structure.no_conftest: No conftest.py/conftest.ts. The preload.ts file is the global setup.

key_helpers.llm_server: test/lib/llm-server.ts — TestLLMServer for mock LLM responses
key_helpers.cli_process: test/lib/cli-process.ts — spawns opencode CLI as subprocess

fixtures_and_helpers.fake_services: test/fake/ — account.ts, auth.ts, npm.ts, provider.ts, skill.ts (stub Layers for test injection)
fixtures_and_helpers.server_integration_harness: test/server/httpapi-exercise/ — full DSL/runtime for HTTP API testing: assertions.ts, backend.ts, dsl.ts, environment.ts, report.ts, routing.ts, runner.ts, runtime.ts, types.ts

no_test_files_but_dir_exists: campaign (1 non-test file, 0 test files, 16 src files)
major_untested_subsystems: context (15 src files) — likely compiler/symbol indexing
review (5 src files) — code review subsystem
binary (3 src files) — binary detection/file handling

snapshot_tests.snapshot_approach: limited — only 3 snapshot files across 280 test files. Most tests use explicit assertions.

integration_e2e_tests.server_httpapi_exercise: test/server/httpapi-exercise/ — 10-file DSL-based integration test harness for HTTP API endpoints
integration_e2e_tests.spawn_pattern: CLI process tests spawn opencode as a subprocess via test/lib/cli-process.ts
